title: gaiatop Turbo Hand Held Fans with LED Torch Clasp Base, Portable Fans Mini Hand Fan, Travel Essentials Small Handheld Rechargeable Desk Fan for Home Office Outdoor Camp, Gifts for Women Men, Black
features: Strong Wind Turbo hand Fan: Updated handheld fan with powerful airflow. This pocket fan features a high‑performance turbo motor and 7 wedge-shaped blades that draw in air efficiently. The airflow is accelerated and compressed through a ducted turbine, then pushed out with force through the air ducts — delivering a stronger, faster cooling breeze — Great for hot summer days

Handheld Fan with LED Torch: A versatile black Hand fan and personal desk fan with an LED torch at the base. Black fan has 3 gear turbo airflow for potent cooling, and comes with a bright LED torch - perfect for power cuts, camping, and hiking. Simply double-press the switch to turn the torch on and off. The torch function alone lasts up to 18.5 hours

2-in-1 Spring Clasp and Base: Fitted with a sturdy spring clasp, this black portable fan can be used three ways: hand-held, freestanding on a desk, or clasped to your backpack, handbag, waistband, or zipper puller for luggage/ boarding cases. Great for outdoor adventures, travel, or daily commutes – keeping you cool wherever you go

Fast Charging & Easy Operation: This USB rechargeable fan supports fast charging, can be fully charged in 2.5 hours and provides up to 6.5 hours of cooling time when fully charged. Press once for using fan; twice for using torch. The screen shows current speed, battery status, and a flashing green light when charging

Compact Design & Mini Size: The size of this mini desk fan is: 5.2*5.2*15cm, 115g. This compact design makes it easy to carry and store, and you can easily put the fan into your pocket and purse. With its minimalist design and aesthetic appeal, this black fan looks great for all women and men – a stylish yet practical gift idea for birthdays, holidays or any special occasion

Gaiatop Brand Service: We offer more than just hand held fan — neck fans, table fans, and clip on fan are also available. Gaiatop is a professional brand dedicated to high-quality, powerful fans. We have a professional technical team and customer service support, available 24/7 to assist you
